About CaloricLab

Free, accurate, science-backed nutrition calculators for everyone.

What Is CaloricLab?

CaloricLab is a suite of free nutrition calculators designed to give you accurate, actionable numbers for your health and fitness goals. Whether you're trying to lose fat, build muscle, or simply understand how your body works, our calculators provide the foundation you need.

We use established, peer-reviewed formulas — the same ones used by registered dietitians and sports scientists — presented in a way that's actually easy to understand and use.

Our Approach

There's a lot of noise in the nutrition world. Fad diets, conflicting advice, and overcomplicated systems leave most people more confused than when they started. CaloricLab cuts through that.

Our philosophy is simple: give people the right numbers, explain the science clearly, and get out of the way. We're not here to sell you a program or a supplement. We're here to give you the tools to make informed decisions.

The Science We Use

All CaloricLab calculators are built on well-established research:

  • Mifflin-St Jeor equation for BMR and TDEE — the most validated formula for the general population
  • Katch-McArdle formula for those who know their body fat percentage
  • Evidence-based protein targets from sports nutrition research
  • ISSN and ACSM guidelines for macronutrient recommendations

Completely Free

All calculators on CaloricLab are and will always be 100% free. No account required, no email signups, no paywalls. We're supported by display advertising, not by selling your data or locking features behind a subscription.

Privacy

The measurements you enter into our calculators are processed entirely in your browser. We don't send your age, weight, height, or any other personal health data to our servers. For more detail, see our Privacy Policy.

Contact

Have a question, found an error, or want to suggest a new calculator? We'd love to hear from you. Reach us at hello@caloriclab.com.
